title: Keep rollback follow-through armed behind cadence review instead of using it as convenience

window_scope.notes: Use only after the cadence route has kept one bounded rollback-followthrough window explicit behind a reviewed drift decision.

lesson_summary: When campaign cadence still needs a contingent rollback lane, keep rollback follow-through explicit and armed behind review rather than spending it as convenience during maintenance drift.
recall_posture: Use as bounded recall only after checking the linked source-owned campaign windows, checked-in rollout history, eval anchors, and derived cadence summaries.
recall_prompts: do not spend rollback as convenience
notes: Memo keeps the cadence recovery pattern subordinate to source-owned campaign windows, checked-in rollout history, eval proof, and derived summaries.
